pi_items.source: setup_task.sh lines 75-91: Buildings created with descriptions matching metadata claim exactly
setup_task.sh lines 24-43 (compliance_instructions.txt): Line 35 specifies 'Set the Attachment Description to "Final Evacuation Plan 2026"'
setup_task.sh line 89: Building created with Status="Sold", matching task description requirement: 'if it is "Sold" or "Inactive", do NOT upload any files'

privileged_info_summary: The emergency_evacuation_plan_update task uses three buildings in OpenMaint: Headquarters (BLD-HQ-001, Active status), Logistics Warehouse (BLD-WH-002, Active status), and North Annex (BLD-NA-099, Sold status). Two PDF files must be uploaded with descriptions: HQ_Evac_Route.pdf to Headquarters, and Warehouse_ZoneB_Draft.pdf to Logistics Warehouse with description 'Final Evacuation Plan 2026'. North Annex is a negative constraint building in Sold status where no files should be uploaded. All data is synthetic, created at task setup time.
